hooks.command: echo '--- Flint Learnings: General ---' && cat .claude/learnings/general.md 2>/dev/null || true
echo '--- Flint Learnings: Safety ---' && cat .claude/learnings/safety.md 2>/dev/null || true
echo '[hook] File written. Ensure reviewer agent is invoked before marking work complete.'
echo '[hook] Session ending. If any non-trivial change was made, retrospective-coach must be run to log lessons. Skip only for trivial edits (typos, formatting).'
echo '--- Re-injecting Flint Learnings after compaction ---' && cat .claude/learnings/general.md 2>/dev/null || true && cat .claude/learnings/safety.md 2>/dev/null || true
echo '[hook] specialist-supabase finished. Remind: append learnings to .claude/learnings/supabase.md if non-trivial work was done.'
echo '[hook] specialist-scoring finished. Remind: append learnings to .claude/learnings/scoring.md if non-trivial work was done.'
echo '[hook] specialist-safety finished. Safety-sensitive work — reviewer must sign off before this is considered complete.'
echo '[hook] specialist-product finished. Remind: append learnings to .claude/learnings/product.md if non-trivial work was done.'
echo '[hook] specialist-typescript finished. If types were regenerated, verify database.ts is consistent with current schema.'
echo '[hook] builder finished. Reviewer must now be invoked — do not skip.'
echo '[hook] critical-thinker finished. Builder may only proceed if verdict is APPROVED or CONDITIONAL (all conditions resolved).'
echo '[hook] reviewer finished. If verdict is PASS or CONDITIONAL PASS (resolved), run retrospective-coach next.'
